steps.title: Recognize the negation paired with the actual case
steps.content: The blank comes between “didn't write in Modern English” and “he wrote in Middle English”—a structure that contrasts what is false with what is true.

steps.title: Select the answer that signals this contrast
steps.content: ”Instead” directly signals the substitution required by the sentence structure. The other three miss the contrast by suggesting causality, addition, or similarity. That matches choice B — B is correct.
